summary: Yahoo Finance reported that Salesforce management disclosed plans to lay off about 4,000 customer support workers as AI tools took over more service tasks.
evidenceQuote: Management also disclosed internal plans to lay off about 4,000 customer support workers as AI tools take over more service tasks.
notes: Added from the Yahoo Finance article Matt supplied. This is a direct AI-replacement style case tied to customer support automation.

sources.name: Yahoo Finance
sources.quote: Management also disclosed internal plans to lay off about 4,000 customer support workers as AI tools take over more service tasks.
